overall.description: A nighttime aerial journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city in the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera, mounted inside a flying vehicle, descends from an open plaza between neon-lit skyscrapers down through narrow building corridors and into a multi-level parking garage. Heavy rain and neon lighting create a characteristic dystopian atmosphere throughout the descent.

begins gradual descent toward building cluster

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle forward over the flooded plaza while maintaining altitude

tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
large floating advertisement display on the left side of the plaza
large floating advertisement display on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude view of a rain-soaked flooded plaza surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The vehicle-mounted camera moves steadily forward through heavy rain, with holographic advertisements visible on distant buildings. A UI element appears identifying the location as Little China, and the vehicle begins a gradual descent toward the building cluster ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical descent corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: moves from open plaza into close proximity with building facades
passing into shadow of buildings with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: navigating the flying vehicle downward between close building walls while maintaining forward momentum

vertical concrete surface of the adjacent skyscraper
external HVAC equipment mounted on the building exterior
building wall section painted in distinctive red color

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a narrow vertical corridor between high-rise buildings, passing close to window grids and concrete walls. The open sky becomes mostly obscured by surrounding architecture, and the lighting shifts to a mix of neon glow and building shadows. The flooded plaza disappears from view as the vehicle focuses on navigating the tight vertical space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with dense neon signage

events.description: entering densely packed neon-lit corridor with vertical signage
passing under overhead walkways and building extensions

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering through extremely tight gaps between buildings covered in neon advertisements

tall vertical signage with red neon characters running up the building face
reflective glass curtain wall of the adjacent skyscraper

segments.scene_description: The vehicle threads through extremely narrow alleyways between buildings covered in dense neon signage, particularly prominent red vertical signs. The space is tightly enclosed with glass facades on one side and concrete walls on the other. Overhead walkways and building extensions occasionally occlude the view as the descent continues through the neon-lit canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level parking garage with parked vehicles

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into open parking garage structure
passing parked vehicles and a pedestrian on the garage deck

agents.ego_description: flying through the parking garage levels while avoiding parked cars and structural columns

stationary vehicles parked along the garage deck

decorative orange accent stripe on the parking structure walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow neon corridors, the vehicle enters a multi-level parking garage with concrete ramps and parked cars. The environment shifts from neon-lit alleys to artificial overhead lighting. A pedestrian in yellow clothing is visible walking across the deck as the vehicle continues its descent through the structured parking levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower parking deck approaching exit tunnel

events.description: approaching darker tunnel entrance with reduced lighting
entering dark tunnel or underpass at parking garage exit

agents.ego_description: moving through the lower parking levels toward the exit tunnel

entered.detail: flat concrete driving surface of the lower parking level
structural pillars supporting the parking garage levels
elevated roadway passing over the parking area
dark unlit tunnel entrance at the end of the parking deck

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the lower levels of the parking garage, passing concrete support columns and under overhead roadways. The lighting becomes progressively darker as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance. The parked cars become more distant as the vehicle navigates toward the dark exit, completing the descent from the aerial plaza to ground level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a vast, neon-lit urban plaza down into the concrete depths of a multi-level parking garage. It begins high above a rain-soaked flooded plaza in Little China, moving steadily forward through heavy rain and holographic advertisements before starting a gradual dive toward a cluster of skyscrapers. As the vehicle descends, the open sky is obscured by the surrounding architecture, shifting the view into a narrow vertical corridor of window grids and concrete walls. The scene then tightens further into a neon-lit canyon of dense red signage and glass facades, threading through narrow alleyways and under overhead walkways. Finally, the camera exits the neon corridors to enter a structured parking garage, passing a pedestrian in yellow clothing and concrete support columns as the lighting dims toward a dark tunnel entrance at ground level.
